listings.description: Don't miss out! Contact our STL leasing agent for more details about this listing and ask the leasing agent about our Section 8 properties, too! Jonna @ 636 395-1484 / email; Jonnasells@outlook.com

A beautifully maintained 3-bedroom house offering smart, versatile living. This home features a spacious bedroom, a fully usable basement ideal for storage, a home office, or additional living space, and a private garage for secure parking and convenience. Thoughtfully designed and full of potential.  Don't miss out! Contact our STL leasing agent for more details about this listing.  Jonna @ 636 395-1484 / email;  Jonna@legacyinvest.net.
***Section 8 accepted.  Newly remodeled house in the Georgian Hills Subdivision. Please call Jeff Turner (only Memphis agent) at 582-5522 or go to website at https://bht-llc.com for more information.

Charming 3-bedroom house offering comfortable living with great space throughout.
